channel.title: Highlights on ibrafdj
channel.description: Recent content in Highlights on ibrafdj

item.title: Engineer
item.description: I integrate Electrical, Software, and Marine engineering to develop full-stack robotics systems. My expertise span embedded systems, GNC (guidance, navigation, and control), SLAM, and computer vision.

item.title: Operator
item.description: I operate robots such as Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) and Remotely Operated Vehicles (ROVs) in the field, with three succesful missions at sea across Indonesia and the UK.

item.title: Researcher
item.description: I build innovative robotics systems and produce novel insight from field data collected by robots, validated by two patents registered and two published academic papers.
